classes.reasoning: Header explicitly states 'CASE REPORT FORM -- CYCLE 2 DAY 1 VISIT' with study identifier, form version 2.1, site ID, patient code, and structured data collection sections (vital signs, ECOG PS, study drug dispensing, concomitant medications, adverse events, PRO questionnaires, and lab results). summary: This is a Case Report Form (CRF) documenting a Cycle 2 Day 1 visit for patient BRC471-IT01-004 at Italian site IT-01 in study BIORCE-ONC-2023-001. The form captures vital signs, ECOG performance status, study drug dispensing (200mg BID), concomitant medications, adverse events (nausea and acneiform dermatitis, both Grade 1), PRO questionnaires (EORTC QLQ-C30 and QLQ-LC13), and laboratory results showing low hemoglobin.
